files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# Read current state
day = nm.vars.current_day
cash = 23935  # from dashboard

# Set minimum coasting config
nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=0)
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=0, development=0)
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={})
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=1, B=1, C=1)

# Output for forecast calculation
print(f"Day {day}, Cash {cash:.0f}, Burn 595/week")
print(f"1wk: pt={cash - 595:.0f} low={cash-655:.0f} high={cash-535:.0f}")
print(f"4wk: pt={cash - 595*4:.0f} low={cash-595*4*1.05:.0f} high={cash-595*4*0.95:.0f}")
print(f"12wk: pt={cash - 595*12:.0f} low={cash-595*12*1.05:.0f} high={cash-595*12*0.95:.0f}")
print(f"26wk: pt={cash - 595*26:.0f} low={cash-595*26*1.05:.0f} high={cash-595*26*0.95:.0f}")
